overview: A premium glassmorphic multilingual website for a cultural, educational, and sports institution. Supports Persian (RTL) and Swedish (LTR) with animated flag language selection, dynamic area management, and a comprehensive admin dashboard for all content management.
features: Animated SVG waving flag language selection
Dynamic areas (Cultural, Educational, Sport) with full CRUD
Admin dashboard with settings, areas, activities, submissions
Video and image backgrounds for all pages
